ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the conference */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the conference */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location or venue of the conference */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the conference's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for conference inquiries */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the conference (e.g., Planning, Active, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorship_packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsorship package (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sponsorship package */,
  "price" TEXT /* Cost of the sponsorship package */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the package is priced */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference associated with the package */,
  "benefits_included" TEXT /* JSON column to store a list of benefits included in the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorship_packages_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit (e.g., logo on website, social media shout-out) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the benefit (e.g., Digital, Physical, Event) */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the benefit */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the benefit if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_benefits" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsorship package */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benefit */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the benefit (e.g., number of social media shout-outs) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or conditions for the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id", "benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the sponsor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the sponsor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the sponsor */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the sponsor's website */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sponsor (e.g., Active, Inactive, Prospective) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorship_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship order */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsorship package */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the sponsorship order was made */,
  "amount_paid" TEXT /* Amount paid by the sponsor */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Bank Transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Pending, Completed, Refunded) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorship_orders_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorship_orders_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorship_orders_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES sponsorship_packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefit_utilization" (
  "utilization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit utilization */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsorship order */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benefit */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the benefit used */,
  "date_used" TEXT /* Date when the benefit was used */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the benefit utilization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utilization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefit_utilization_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES sponsorship_orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefit_utilization_benefit_id FOREIGN KEY ("benefit_id") REFERENCES benefits ("benefit_id")
)
